entity.summary: Self-custodial perpetuals decentralized exchange on Starknet offering leveraged crypto and traditional-asset markets with on-chain collateral custody and verifiable settlement.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and recently updated documentation describe Extended as a perpetuals DEX on Starknet with self-custodied funds, on-chain settlement, and active trading across crypto and traditional-asset markets.

evidence.title: Extended official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website exposes live trading entry points and describes unified-margin trading across crypto and traditional-asset markets.

evidence.title: Extended Overview and Vision
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Extended as a perpetuals DEX offering 100+ markets across crypto, equities, FX, commodities, and indices.

evidence.title: Extended Technical Architecture
evidence.notes: First-party architecture documentation states that Extended is a perpetuals DEX built on Starknet with self-custodied funds in on-chain smart contracts and on-chain transaction validation and settlement.
